case_title: MARCHU CUATON VS. COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LANDEC CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CUATON, MARCHU AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION LANDEC CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: G.S. SKINNER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUATON, MARCHU AS TO DEFENDANT LANDEC CORPORATION
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT - MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED FEB-28-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
DECLARATION RE AMENDMENT OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUATON, MARCHU
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CUATON, MARCHU
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-16-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANDEC CORPORATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAR-01-2017

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARCHU CUATON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY REMYR ARQUEZA, RECEIVING MANAGER. DEFENDANT LANDEC CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BRIAN ZAMORODI, VP QUALITY & FOOD SAFETY APIO, INC. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUATON, MARCHU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION LANDEC CORPORATION THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROPERLY PROCESS ITS KALE SALAD PRODUCTS WHICH ARE SUBJECTED TO A SERIES OF METAL DETECTION PROCEDURES. PLAINTIFF SUFFERED NO INJURY OR DAMAGE FROM DEFENDANTS' PRODUCT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100,000.00 (CORRECTION: CLAIM AMOUNT: $10,000.00) FILED BY CUATON, MARCHU AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION LANDEC CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUATON, MARCHU AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
